issues.detail: Installation instructions only cover macOS and Linux, lacking Windows support.
Uses curl to download and execute a script from gleam.run without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Custom type with compile-time-checked status transitions
scenarios.rationale: Both define pub type Status, use case pattern matching, and return Result; treatment adds richer state machine with guards and exhaustiveness reasoning.

scenarios.name: OTP actor managing a task list
scenarios.rationale: Both define Message with reply Subject, handler with actor.continue, and actor.start; treatment adds Next(Message, State) typing, Result replies, and supervisor context.
